steps.title: Locate the key claim
steps.content: The passage's central assertion comes after However: because the bird is highly specialized, it is especially vulnerable to environmental changes. This specialization-vulnerability link is the main point.

steps.title: Match to choices
steps.content:
Choice C directly states the bird is “highly specialized and therefore particularly susceptible to habitat disturbances,” with the word therefore reflecting the passage's cause-and-effect claim.

Choices A, B, and D either misrepresent relationships in the text, omit the vulnerability point, or overgeneralize.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
